programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep103: A Country Like No Other – Costa Rica (Part 2)
programme.desc: Costa Rica is a country like no other: Get ready to chase down Yellowfin Tuna in a pod of Dolphins; hike waterfalls; and trek through the rainforest in search of the perfect surfing beach.

programme.title: Xplash Ep106
programme.desc: Xplash brings you the coolest action in, on, and near water. Today we’ll get soaked in Africa's great Nile River while kayak surfing; Maya Gabeira goes in search of the biggest wave ever surfed by a woman; and our first stop takes us windsurfing in Maui.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Kayak Fishing vs TV Sports Reporter
programme.desc: Mike takes Brooke Fletcher, of Bally Sports, out for her first time in a fishing kayak! The former Miss Georgia not only catches her first fish, but also had an amazing time doing it! After fishing in the remote quarries outside of Chicago, Brooke takes Mike into her studio and shows him what it is like to be on live TV every day!

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep243: Powerboat World Championships + New York Yacht Club Invitational + Kitefoil World Tour + Red Bull Sailing Team
programme.desc: Powerboat World Championships + New York Yacht Club Invitational + Kitefoil World Tour in Pingtan, China + Red Bull Sailing Team Profile

programme.title: Blue World Ep810: A Search for a Stargazer + Playful Seals
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird returns to one of his favorite dive sites, the Blue Heron Bridge in Riviera Beach, Florida, in search of a rare and amazing fish: The Stargazer. Then he invites his wife Christine and son Liam to meet some playful seals in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure Ep205: South American Whitewater Kayak Adventure
programme.desc: A team of world-class kayakers heads south to the far reaches of Chile’s lush and unpopulated landscape in search of the most challenging whitewater on a kayak expedition like no other, filled with tight canyons, breathtaking waterfalls and non-stop action.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep706: Stand-Up Paddling Montréal and Cantons-de-l’Est – Quebec, Canada
programme.desc: Luke Hopkins heads to Montréal, Québec, to put his stand-up paddling skills to the ultimate test on the huge waves of the Saint Lawrence River’s Lachine Rapids. Alex Kellar then explores the nearby tranquil rivers and lakes via stand-up paddleboard.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep103: Plastics Pollution
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep124: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour from the United Arab Emirates
programme.desc: The UIM F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour heads to Sharjah in the United Arab Emirates for highlights from the sixth and final round of the F1H2O Powerboat World Championships.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep201: Vancouver Island – Canada
programme.desc: Water Ways TV host Steven Bull checks out Vancouver Island, from deep sea fishing to inland lakes with a special appearance by the Canadian Forces Snowbirds.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: Standing Ovation
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 01
programme.desc: Jamie Lynn is an introvert. In his snowboarding and art-making, however, he’s big and expressive. Watch Episode 1 of his legendary Microdose series. Featuring Circe Wallace, Mike Hatchett, Sean Sullivan, Temple Cummins, Jason Loeb, Micah Shapiro, Colter Gerber, Apostalos and Demetrius Karabotsos.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of the Jamie Lynn series, Jamie talks about how the creativity of the artists and skateboarders Mark Gonzales and Neil Blender guides his approach to life as a snowboarder and artist. Featuring Circe Wallace, Matt Cummins, Dano Pendygrasse, Joel Gomez, Scott Sullivan, and Matt Remine.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 03
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, we talk with a pioneering professional snowboarder and filmmaker, an iconic 90s shredder, and a Tahoe photographer about Jamie Lynn. Join us for tales of guts, gusto, and good jumping genes. Featuring Dave Seoane, Peter Line, and Ruben Sanchez.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 04
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series we talk with a handful of Jamie’s fellow athletes and industry peers about his loyalties to Sessions, Volcom, Vans, and LibTech among other sponsors. Featuring Joel Gomez, Dave Seoane, Richard Woolcott, Bryan Iguchi, Mike Parillo, and Billy Anderson.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 05
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Terje Haakonsen shares his insights on Mr. Lynn. From annual meet-ups at Mt. Baker to destinations around the world, Terje takes you there. Featuring Terje Haakonsen, Bryan Iguchi, Richard Woolcott, Ryan Immegart, Mike Parillo, and Troy Eckert.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 06
programme.desc: In Episode 6 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Jamie details the process of filming the iconic Volcom snowboarding movie, ‘The Garden,’ directed by Richard Woolcott. Spoiler Alert: The experience was awesome. Featuring Troy Eckert, Tucker Hall, Billy Anderson, Nicholas Adams, and Mike Parillo.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 07
programme.desc: In Episode 7, we set the snowboarding tales aside to go deep on Jamie Lynn’s passion for art-making. Tune-in to learn how Lynn’s tight-knit crew motivated one another, both on and off the hill, to pursue parallel paths in visual art. Featuring Bryan Iguchi, Schoph, Jamie Heinrich and Pete Saari.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 1: California to Arizona
programme.desc: In Episode 1, the Volcom Skate Team ride motorcycles through the California and Arizona deserts, embracing all that the open road has to offer. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Remy Stratton, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 2: Arizona to Utah
programme.desc: In Episode 2, the Volcom Skate Team find themselves motorcycling and skateboarding through Arizona and Utah, with a stop at the Grand Canyon. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Remy Stratton, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 3: Belgium to Germany
programme.desc: In Episode 3, the Volcom Skate Team motorcycle through Belgium and Germany, ride skateboards, and visit The Picturebooks. Featuring Jonathan Thijs, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Fynn Grabke, Phillip Mirtschink, Claus Grabke, and Baumi.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 4: Germany to Denmark
programme.desc: In Episode 4, the Volcom Skate Team ride through Germany and Denmark. In Copenhagen, they visit Motorious, a vintage motorcycle shop. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, Jonathan Thijs and Kasper Krogh.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 6: Mexico
programme.desc: In this bonus episode, skaters CJ Collins, Jackson Pilz, and others ride motorcycles between Mexico City and San Miguel de Allende. Featuring Collin Provost, CJ Collins, Braulio Sagas, Kervin Miranda, Luka Barrena, Arto Saari, Diego Espinoza, Ginther Estrada, Ryan Loughridge, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nissan's all-wheel monster GT-R had to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with turbo engine was taken to its limits in Finnish Lapland. Also: the Mercedes-Benz S 500 plug-in hybrid.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: One of the most beautiful GT car models is the Maserati Gran Turismo S. With the 570GT, English sports car manufacturer McLaren introduced its first grand tourer. It was supposed to be the most comfortable but still very sporty McLaren.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Many of today's supercars rely on hybrid technology or even drive purely electrically. We take a look at the sports cars of the future and try to get an insight into the latest and planned technology.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 GTS closed the gap between the S and the GT3 in their sports car model range. Also: the Roding Roadster, a handcrafted lightweight sports car with technology by BMW at its core.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mulsanne, Bentley's flagship car, provides luxury like in a first class hotel and elegance like an Armani suit. In addition: the Rolls-Royce Ghost. And: the high-tech coupe by Mercedes, the S 63 AMG with its V8 twin-turbo engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracán Spyder, the Pagani Huayra and Ferrari's 488 Spider don't just look good. Once these super sports cars unleash their power, there is no stopping them. We took a look at these contenders, their features and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's Vantage N430 model is a sports car that makes drivers and enthusiasts feel the heritage of British race cars. Also: a combination of elegance and power, the Bentley Continental GTC Speed with its W12 Twin Turbo engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they’re spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: In this new episode of Maxiboat we travel to the Cannes Yachting Festival 2021 for a special show. We jump on board the new Beneteau Gran Trawler 62, discover the Outremer 55 sailing catamaran, the new 2022 outboards and notably the incredible V12 from the American Mercury. Also at the Yachting Festival, we will dive into the most beautiful new motorboats and yachts of the show: Riva 68 Diable, Azimut Grande Trideck, Azimut 53, Azimut 68, the Swan Shadow and the Med Yacht 42.

programme.title: Jump On Board - Épisode 10

programme.title: Discovering Murray River

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4
programme.desc: Vodice is a famous tourist destination known for many breathtaking beaches and vibrant and rich offer of all tourist attractions. It is known for its liveliness and its friendly hosts. Located on the coast in a wide bay, 11 km northwest ofŠibenik, it is the ideal vacation spot for everyone. Check it out in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5
programme.desc: The region of Imotski is a historical name for the area. We are determined in today's episode to visit this region and a town straight out of a fairytale - magical Imotski. We’ll indulge in natural beauties and set off across the sea to the islands of Iž, Molat and Dugi otok. Stay with us and find out more about this wonderful area!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E04 - Juggled Lives
programme.desc: Dr. AJ Wheeler's hectic schedule keeps him out of action, but his team battles high winds in the heli to save a snowmobiler with a busted femur. Then another call comes in and Dr. Wheeler is there, trying to rescue a man who tumbles off a 200 foot cliff.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:05 - 3 in 1 Day
programme.desc: For Jess, life at home feels out of control. But she's got the work routine dialed in, even as the team is hit with an unprecedented three rescues in under twelve hours.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E05 - Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanalian Aviation bush pilots Joel and Josiah earn their keep slinging a stranded snow machine.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots - S02:E06 - Into The Deep
programme.desc: The bush pilots have to use all their skills - scuba diving, underwater rigging and expert flying - to try and salvage a de Havilland Beaver wing at the bottom of the 6 Mile Lake.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E30 - Prince William And Prince Harry Prisoners Of Celebrity
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E11 - Royal Children Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. programme.title: Look Forward Not Far
programme.desc: We all go through times when we’re looking ahead, and our future looks uncertain. We want clarity, but instead, God gives us the courage to move forward in faith. It’s in these moments we learn not to be driven by what’s easy but to be pulled forward by purpose.

programme.title: New Number Same Name
programme.desc: If you’re looking at what’s next and feeling nervous, remember this: What God has done in your life is only the foundation, not the finish line. He’s a creative God, still at work in ways you’re not expecting. Let go of your plan so God can show you His purpose.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel receives a note from El Doliente, anticipating his death. The plan against Rosa Blanco failed. She continues to relate the events of the past; Ezequiel, forcing her to take the murder weapon, managed to get her to be blamed for this murder, for which she paid so many years of unjust imprisonment.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Nicolás wants a divorce to try to win back Victoria's love, Florencia refuses to separate; Nicolás makes it clear to his wife that he cannot be tied to her because he does not love her. Late at night, Sergio shows his future wife the apartment they will occupy once they get married; Sergio kisses her passionately. Early in the morning, Clementina finds a sleepless Nicolas at the door of his house waiting for Victoria; Clementina tries to convince Del Casal that Victoria spent the night with Sergio, but Nicolas refuses to lose his beloved; as much as Clementina tries to understand why Victoria will marry a man she does not love and cannot please, Victoria needs the support of her friend as a witness in her marriage, which will take place the next day.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Because the only way to forget Nicolás is to marry Sergio, Victoria asks her future husband to prepare the wedding for the next day. On a new day, Eugenia unburdens herself with Nicolás, because she does not understand how the person she thought could make her happy is now the one who hurts her the most; when Victoria contacts Sergio to tell him that she is ready to go to the headquarters, Nicolás takes his beloved in his arms to take her away. Despite Victoria's efforts to escape from a smitten Nicolas who has kidnapped her to prove his love, Victoria does not manage to escape; Nicolas challenges his beloved to contact Sergio to inform him of her whereabouts. For his part, Sergio approaches Clementina, who - seeing that Victoria is not with Sergio - assumes that her friend has decided to escape from the mistake she was about to make by marrying a man she does not love.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: In a corner of the park, hidden and watching them, is Guillermo who took his son. Downcast, Lorena asks Alberto not to worry about her anymore. Carmen is unaware of Virginia's pregnancy. Once again, Pedro leaves Lorena with no way out, ordering her to shoot straight at Marco Aurelio's heart if she does not want to end up recognizing her son's corpse in a morgue - Elvis desperately asks Ricardo for help to get rid of the baby Virginia is expecting.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Elvis asks Virginia about the abortion. Moved by shame in front of her mother and fear of not knowing how to deal with a pregnancy, Virginia agrees. Carmen, despite the bridges she has built with her daughter, cannot get her daughter to confide in her about what she is going through. Lorena is torn between telling Marco Aurelio the whole truth or continuing to hide, fearing for Ignacio's life.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Missing her, Israel takes Pastora to a five-star hotel, where she informs Clara Inés that she has been thrown out of the Santa María mansion because she is now its owner.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: After a phone call, Pastora says that Clara Inés will go to prison for being an impostor, Elisenda is surprised by the news.

programme.title: AUTORES EN VIVO
programme.desc: Programa musical en vivo que destaca el talento de diversos autores, ofreciendo presentaciones íntimas y entrevistas que conectan al público con la esencia de sus canciones.

programme.desc: Programa dinámico que celebra la música con actuaciones en directo y entrevistas a artistas

programme.desc: Programa que promueve el análisis y la discusión de temas variados

programme.desc: Programa que promueve el análisis y la discusión de temas variados

programme.title: RESUMEN SEMANAL UCL
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: 100% EN FORMA
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: La Mujer que Hablaba con Los Muertos
programme.desc: Es un film de Terror. Cuando Elena Castaño era una niña, tenía un don: era capaz de comunicarse con los espíritus de los muertos. pero esa capacidad desapareció al crecer.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: ¡Ni Te Me Acerques!
programme.desc: Él solo tenía que cuidar el hotel y teclear su novela, como Jack Nicholson en “El Resplandor”, pero de buen rollo. Y Llega la cuarentena y se queda le pilla en el Hotel Balneario de Ariño haciendo frente a la paranoia general, el acoso de las fuerzas del orden, las videollamadas de su novia, su madre y del conspiranoico Javi... Todos nos aburrimos mucho en el primer confinamiento. Juan no.

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
